purpose: Define the Codex/browser task needed to inspect HKJC racecard links, scripts, and network payloads after PR-139. This file is not a calendar input and does not promote records.

task.reason: The assistant web environment could not open the HKJC date-addressable racecard URLs directly. Browser-capable inspection is needed before any race-time snapshot or B+ promotion.

codex_prompt.title: Inspect HKJC 2026-06-03 Happy Valley racecard safely
codex_prompt.prompt: Open the official HKJC racecard URL for RaceNo=5, Racecourse=HV, racedate=2026/06/03. Inspect only official racing.hkjc.com page links, embedded scripts, and browser network requests. Find whether there is a stable official route that lists every race_number and race_time for the 2026-06-03 Happy Valley meeting. Do not collect odds, pools, betting, dividends, predictions, tips, runner-level details, or performance data. Return only route findings and, if fully source-verified, a race_number/race_time list using the requested JSON schema.

inspection_steps: Open the known working sample URL in a browser-capable environment.
Record whether the page loads without error and shows the known 20:40 RaceNo=5 header.
Inspect same-page race navigation links and controls for other RaceNo values.
Inspect embedded scripts and inline JSON for race lists or race times.
Inspect browser network requests triggered by the initial load and by switching race numbers.
Look for a meeting-level official HKJC page that lists every race and start time for 2026-06-03 Happy Valley.
Stop if the source exposes only betting, odds, pool, dividend, prediction, or runner-level data unrelated to race_number/race_time.

expected_result_schema.source_url: official HKJC URL used to verify the result, or null if not found
expected_result_schema.request_url_pattern: official HKJC URL or request pattern, or null if not found

races.race_source_url: official HKJC racecard URL for that race

expected_result_schema.reason_not_verified: Required when inspection_status is partial or not_verified.

promotion_decision.allowed_future_rank_after_verified_full_: B+ candidate only; June 2026 full-month promotion still requires every HKJC meeting to be source-verified.
promotion_decision.last_race_time_definition: Final race start time, not meeting_end_time.

next_steps: Run this task in Codex or a local browser with DevTools.
Commit the inspection result JSON only after official-source verification.
If the result is verified_full_meeting, the following PR may add a one-meeting race_number/race_time snapshot; otherwise keep HKJC at C.
